message:
fix(layout): coalesce multiple destroy lifecycle markers per participant

Refactor sequence diagram lifecycle marker handling to emit a single
destroy marker at the earliest destroy point when a participant
receives multiple destroy events. Replaces inline vector collection
during event iteration with a bitmap + post-pass approach.

- Coalesce duplicate destroy events per participant into one marker
- Position marker at the lowest (final) y-coordinate
- Add test verifying coalesced destroy events

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
